title: Distance
description:
Distance-based fog settings for air, water, lava, and weather conditions.

Properties:
• air (object)
• water (object)
• lava (object)
• lava_resistance (object)
• weather (object)
• powder_snow (object)

air.title: Air
air.description:
Fog settings when the player is in air.

Properties:
• fog_start (float)
• fog_end (float)
• fog_color (string)
• render_distance_type (enum)

defaultSnippets.label: Fog Distance Settings
defaultSnippets.description: Distance fog settings for a specific environment type (air, water, lava, etc.).

water.title: Water
water.description:
Fog settings when the player is in water.

Properties:
• fog_start (float)
• fog_end (float)
• fog_color (string)
• render_distance_type (enum)
• transition_fog ({ init_fog, min_percent, mid_seconds, ... })

defaultSnippets.label: Fog Distance Settings with Transition
defaultSnippets.description: Distance fog settings that include transition fog support (primarily for water).

lava.title: Lava
lava.description:

defaultSnippets.description: Distance fog settings for a specific environment type (air, water, lava, etc.).
